creator: timp87@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 254140
port patch

Hello
This is a followup of https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=281737

- add .desktop file for cinnamon only. This makes polkit-gnome autostart in Cinnamon once a user is logged in, forcing admin actions in cinnamon-settings to be authenticated. Gnome/XFCE maintainers may add these DEs to OnlyShowIn list later if needed.
- while here also set LICENSE
